title: Ultra Photorealistic Luxury Activewear Campaign Arranged As a
sourceTitle: Create Ultra Photorealistic Luxury Activewear Campaign Arranged
prompt:
Create an ultra-photorealistic luxury activewear campaign arranged as a polished 2x2 editorial collage. Show the same beautiful athletic female model in four different stylish poses, wearing a premium monochrome yellow activewear set. The outfit should include a fitted yellow sports bra or tank-style active top and matching high-waisted shorts or leggings with a sculpting, body-contouring fit. The overall look should feel modern, feminine, energetic, wellness-focused, and high-end, like a premium global sportswear brand advertisement.

Keep the concept centered on healthy lifestyle and fitness. In the collage, include these visual ideas across the four panels: the model holding fresh healthy vegetables and groceries, the model lifting a broccoli like a dumbbell, the model eating a green apple in a chic close-up beauty shot, and the model wearing premium yellow over-ear headphones with a modern luxury feel. Also include a stylish mesh bag filled with fresh lemons in one of the panels or as part of the grocery/wellness styling.

Use four different poses across the collage:
1. a confident standing hero pose holding fresh vegetables and healthy groceries,
2. a fashion-forward leaning or bending pose wearing yellow over-ear headphones,
3. a fitness detail pose holding a broccoli like a dumbbell,
4. an intimate close-up beauty pose while eating a green apple, with lemons in a mesh bag incorporated elegantly into the styling.

Keep the model’s identity, outfit, and styling consistent across all four panels while varying the pose, crop, and attitude. The model should have polished glowing skin, refined soft-glam makeup, and sleek glossy hair styled in a clean modern way. Accessories should be minimal and elevated.

Set the shoot in a clean, minimal studio environment with soft neutral or warm light-gray backgrounds and a refined editorial-commercial atmosphere. Lighting should be bright, soft, and premium, with subtle contouring, realistic shadows, and a fresh luxury wellness aesthetic.

The yellow outfit must look expensive and realistic, with visible fabric texture, clean seam lines, subtle stretch tension, realistic stitching, and a matte-luxe performance finish. The final collage should feel like a chic luxury activewear campaign: fresh, stylish, sporty, health-conscious, polished, eye-catching, and professionally art-directed.
Negative prompt:

bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, deformed hands, blurry face, blurry fabric, cheap fabric, flat lighting, inconsistent face, inconsistent outfit, duplicate poses, messy collage, plastic skin, AI glow, watermark, logo, text artifacts, low quality
